node.statement: (Recovery: Block-Diagonal Algebras → Mixed Bound). When A = ⊕_{i=1}^N M_{d_i}(C), the main theorem gives the new bound Σ_{i: λ_i > 0} r_i² ≤ m+1, where r_i = rank(ρ_i) for the density matrix in each active block. This simultaneously constrains ranks within blocks and the number of active blocks, interpolating between Carathéodory (all d_i = 1) and Barvinok-Pataki (N = 1).
